summary.rationale: Positive employee sentiment; low innovation culture; 40 reviews

reviews.title: Great place to work
reviews.pros: GE is a great place to work.
reviews.cons: None, I loved everything about my job

reviews.title: Great company
reviews.pros: Good experience with lots of benefits
reviews.cons: They prioritize, saving money and hiring overseas rather than finding the right talent

reviews.title: It's what you'd expect. Big.
reviews.pros: Lots of different tech lines to work on.
reviews.cons: You're almost an anonymous worker.

reviews.title: Good people
reviews.pros: People I worked with were solid
reviews.cons: Mega corporate culture dominates daily decisions

reviews.title: Great staff
reviews.pros: Great company and nice colleagues
reviews.cons: Nothing to write now on GE

reviews.title: So / So
reviews.pros: GE does a great job of having group meetings
reviews.cons:
Weird only-promote people who started as college interns culture.

Not great place for women to work.  Still struggling there!
reviews.advice: Allow opportunity for everyone - especially passionate, high-performing employees regardless of gender or if they were a college intern.  You have / had some great folks who left because of this.

reviews.title: GE Aerospace
reviews.pros: Great community and employee engagement
reviews.cons: Hard to break out of the HR defined pay band

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.pros: Get to work with very talented people
reviews.cons: It is a very large company

reviews.title: Loved it
reviews.pros: Very professional, very smart people
reviews.cons: Company struggled and split in 3

reviews.title: Great employer
reviews.pros: Fast paced, decision making autonomy, challenging environment
reviews.cons: None. Great place for work ethics and career development

reviews.title: Good
reviews.pros: Great place to work at
reviews.cons: Flight deck does not always work

reviews.title: Analyst
reviews.pros: Very nice interviewers, good company culture
reviews.cons: Did not end up getting the job but very nice place to work

reviews.title: Horrible Company
reviews.pros: Nothing great about this company!
reviews.cons: Extremely disorganized and toxic! The overall rating for this company is more like a 2.0. It's not worth the time or day to interview or stay with this company. Turnover is very high!

reviews.title: Not a fan
reviews.pros: The idea of having an executive chef for demos in show rooms was a good one on paper. Compensation was fair.
reviews.cons: Way too corporate (though that's to be expected, it's GE). Impossible to work through red tape, difficulty getting paid, very little proper guidance or oversight.

reviews.title: NA
reviews.pros: good team to work with
reviews.cons: fast paced team to work with

reviews.title: Good
reviews.pros: Ok to work for i think
reviews.cons: Management can be tedious at tines

reviews.title: Great place to work
reviews.pros: Good pay, great opportunities to work on multidisciplinary projects with experts in the field.
reviews.cons: Management has a lot of boxes to check, which flow down as meaningless actions for employees. Permissive time off policy means typically less vacation.

reviews.title: Train wreck
reviews.pros: Not any to speak to
reviews.cons: Poor leadership with zero strategic vision

reviews.title: Overall Good Company
reviews.pros: Depth of knowledge and teaching.
reviews.cons: Have to switch roles to grow.

reviews.title: Great Place to Work
reviews.pros: Flexible Hours, and a great environment
reviews.cons: Nothing to mention, was a good experience

reviews.title: Good company
reviews.pros:
Work life balance
Good colleagues
reviews.cons: I don't remember any at the moment

reviews.title: Good
reviews.pros: Work remote and they furnish equipment
reviews.cons: Bidd I need for hours and vacation based on seniority.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.pros: Free bagels here and there
reviews.cons: There is no AC in the building

reviews.title: Pay
reviews.pros: Weekly pay, grill/cafeteria on site
reviews.cons: 5 min breaks and unorganized

reviews.title: GE aircraft mechanic
reviews.pros: Stability decent pay and not too much pressure
reviews.cons: Union not as strong as they were in the past

reviews.title: it went under for good reason
reviews.pros: a salary i suppose is the key pro
reviews.cons: arrogrant management, and overall team, that think they walk on water simply because they earn $100K or more
reviews.advice: they should be fired, and salaries brought more in line

reviews.title: Good place to work
reviews.pros:
1. salary
2. vacation time
3. opportunities if you are good at connecting
reviews.cons:
1. work/life balance if tied to production in any way
2. more work does not equal more pay
reviews.advice: Better career paths, more incentive for hard/good work, better onboarding

reviews.title: Great people, uncertain future
reviews.pros: There is a heavy focus on well being and ensuring a work life balance
reviews.cons: Lack of internal promotion and difficult to finish work that you don't fully control.

reviews.title: Drink the cool aid and you are good
reviews.pros: good people and clear mission
reviews.cons: Limited room for growth with lots of office politics

reviews.title: stressful
reviews.pros: Cool industry, lots of intelligent people, great benefits and time off (if approved)
reviews.cons: Lots of gray areas and items left up to interpretation. Not told you'll have to achieve multiple things along your journey to stay with the company. Items come up that are a condition of employment.

reviews.title: Push for full time employment
reviews.pros: Flexible hours, fun team, good starting pay
reviews.cons: hard to move to full time, no bonuses and no raises, contractors are often the first to be laid off

reviews.title: Good People.  Great place to learn
reviews.pros: some of the smartest people I have had the pleasure of working with.  learning the value of process and how to manage repeatable activities was a great addition to my toolkit
reviews.cons: very bureaucratic; typical, very competitive corporate environment

reviews.title: Metrology
reviews.pros: You get to learn alot on the job
reviews.cons: Not many cons. Depends on your manager and your delivery

reviews.title: Good Starting place
reviews.pros: Learned information to help in the future
reviews.cons: Not sure, have not been there in a while

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.pros: Really worked us hard and gave us little in bonus or compensation after providing years of high profit margins.
reviews.cons: Overworked and underpaid in the industry.
reviews.advice: Welders are not disposable treat us better

reviews.title: GE
reviews.pros: Good company to work for
reviews.cons: Some leadership doesn’t value people first

reviews.title: ok
reviews.pros: paid on time most weeks
reviews.cons: never had a opportunity to earn overtime

reviews.title: Old school corporate
reviews.pros: Inclusive, diverse, lots of opportunities if you’re flexible on location.
reviews.cons: On call 24/7, lots of talk about work life balance but then expectations that were often the opposite.

reviews.title: Medical Sales
reviews.pros: Know company with a strong reputation
reviews.cons: Larger company, so more red tape

reviews.title: good
reviews.pros: good work ethic and working environment
reviews.cons: Not enough support for early careers
